text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to the city on my day off to get a look at something that I think
might cheer Kawakami Princess up.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly an exasperated sigh grabs my attention—it's her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Trainer?! What are you doing here?
choice_data_list: You seem pretty down today.
You seem pretty down today.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah... of course I am! It's horrible! The way that bully behaved
was the worst!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She was just like this character in Princess Fighter... the leader of the
Dark Umamusume, Dark Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I lost to her... This isn't just a bad ending, it's
downright depressing! I've been demoted from princess to frog!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess is more upset about her loss than I thought. The
place I came to check out should be of help though.
choice_data_list: Hey, there's somewhere I think we should go.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm? And where is that?
choice_data_list: Oh, I don't want to spoil it. You'll see.
Oh, I don't want to spoil it. You'll see.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: WHOOOA!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this poster... It's for the very first Princess Fighter movie!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But why... It came out years ago!
choice_data_list:
I found a theater that does showings of older
movies.

I found a theater that does showings of older
movies.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So you mean... we can actually watch Princess Fighter right now? On
the big screen?
choice_data_list: We sure can!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Woohoooo! This is great!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's really the best, Trainer! What're we waiting for? Let's get our
tickets!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think it's working!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaah... That was so moving!
choice_data_list: I'm glad you liked it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I loved it! The first movie will always be the best one! It was so exciting I thought I was going to break my armrests off!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah, like that scene where the princess is surrounded by a billion Dark
Umamusume troops but escapes orbit by following the prince's light
signal!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Or the scene at the moon racetrack where she and the prince purify
the Dark Nebula Emperor after he fused with the black hole! I could
watch it a million times!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was such fun... Really...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A real princess and her prince have to make incredible things like that
happen, huh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But when it came to it, I got wrecked by Dark
Princess—well—someone just like Dark Princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fit to be a princess. The furthest I'll ever get is background
extra...
choice_data_list: But what about that other scene?
But what about that other scene?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? What other scene?
choice_data_list: The one right before the big climax.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right before... Where the princess and trainer are about to enter the
race that'll decide the fate of the planet?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Before the final battle, when things are at their darkest, the
princess and trainer have one last talk...

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
Could this truly be the end for us? Is there no way to save the
planet?!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Trainer
text_block_list.text: Wait, there's still a way... There's one last race for us to finish!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Trainer
text_block_list.text: Wait, there's still a way... There's one last race for us to finish!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Listen to me, Princess. We already know that no matter how much we
struggle, we can't pull off a miracle on our own... unless!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Listen to me, Princess. We already know that no matter how much we
struggle, we can't pull off a miracle on our own... unless!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
We embrace our strengths and weaknesses... And we combine our
differences...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Then our power will far exceed our normal capabilities. That... that is
what makes a real miracle!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Then our power will far exceed our normal capabilities. That... that is
what makes a real miracle!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
("So let's go... to the race of our destiny!" Oooh, the most famous
scene in the movie!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
("So let's go... to the race of our destiny!" Oooh, the most famous
scene in the movie!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (Whoa, wait one moment! What was it I said before?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on. You worry way too much! I don't need any tactics or
anything! Because...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We've got the invincible power of our bond! Just trust it and wait for
my return!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh!
choice_data_list: Are you okay?!
Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I... I was totally taking it easy before! I took things for granted, like a
miracle would just happen on its own!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I've seen the Princess Fighter movie dozens of times! But I forgot such an important thing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I'm so ashamed I could just smash a hole in the ground and hide
in it right this instant!
choice_data_list: Don't worry! Our fight is only beginning!
Don't worry! Our fight is only beginning!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It hasn't been long since we first met. In Princess Fighter terms... we're
on around episode six. We've barely gotten started.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right! That's exactly it! In the beginning, Princess Fighter
doesn't start out as a perfect princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She hates how training is going and swims off to a desert island... And
even crushes the dumbbells given to her by the crafter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But that's when she and the prince talk it out and understand each
other... They grow stronger over the course of forty-nine episodes!
choice_data_list: And that's exactly what we're going to do!
And that's exactly what we're going to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm just starting out too, so I'm far from being Legendary Trainer, but
I'm going to get there someday with Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it! We'll follow the way of the princess together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And I... I want to know more about you—about my prince!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I mean, there's so much I have no idea about! Like, what kind of
clothes you like, or your favorite ramen toppings and training
equipment!
choice_data_list: You have to tell me all about yourself too.
You have to tell me all about yourself too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I definitely will! We'll talk about it all—everything from our
childhoods to what our parents are like!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right... The power of a bond between a princess and her prince...
That's what'll truly power up my racing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I feel like I'm about to explode with energy! Kawakami
Princess... is... baaack!
